front.title: RTP Control Protocol (RTCP) Extended Report (XR) Block for Packet Delay Variation Metric Reporting
front.workgroup: Metric Blocks for use with RTCP's Extended Report Framework

abstract.t: This document defines an RTP Control Protocol (RTCP) Extended Report (XR) block that allows the reporting of packet delay variation metrics for a range of RTP applications. [STANDARDS-TRACK]
